quests.title: Atlas Prime Rebuild
quests.desired_end_state: A verified Atlas Prime successor repository with one Athena-authored multi-file transaction language, Thread Engine as the normal construction workflow, Sword as the independent local fallback and recovery path, Spear and Arrow/Bow as Thread Engine intake modes, Noctua before every merge, Phoenix recovery proof, and an explicitly approved cutover from Atlas Codex.

emberline.current_gate: Gate 6 change-path doctrine and Quest convergence closes through this linked Codex/Prime Reforge. Gate 7 dual-path proof is next.
completed_durable_work: Gate 5 local direct-execution proof is merged at Prime main 3a296f0f1163c7175ab2257abc8d34145dfa2ead.
Codex remains canonical and Prime remains SHADOW.
Thread Engine, Sword, Spear, Arrow, Bow, Noctua, and Strikeforce roles are aligned for future transactions.
Historical Gate 5 Bow naming is preserved while direct local mechanics become predecessor evidence for Sword.
Build and Execute remain separate artifacts and Noctua is required on every exact PR head before merge.
chat_only_or_uncertain: Thread Engine persistent writer activation is not proven or authorized.
Sword has no standing authority; every Sword remains mission-specific.
Quest completion remains broad pending Gate 7, Gate 8, migration waves, recovery, rollback, and cutover.
remaining_work: Prove multi-file ADD and REPLACE through Thread Engine.
Prove mixed ADD, REPLACE, and controlled DELETE fixtures through Sword.
Prove replay, stale-state, linked-repository partial-state, and recovery behavior.
Prove exact-head Noctua enforcement before every merge.
Resume C07 read-only semantic reconciliation and bounded protected migration only in Gate 8.
Prove Quest Board cutover and rollback before authority changes.
emberline.protected_boundary_posture: No raw Drive, finance, health, clinic, runtime, account, network, device, infrastructure, secret, or protected export evidence belongs in GitHub.
emberline.next_safe_action: Prepare the exact Gate 7 dual-path proof Preview and stop before implementation or execution.
emberline.next_approval_gate: Jayson approval of the exact Gate 7 Preview before any Thread Engine or Sword proof artifact is prepared.
must_not_happen_yet: Do not activate persistent Thread Engine writer or Artemis.
Do not grant standing Sword authority.
Do not begin C07 mutation before Gate 8.
Do not move or delete Drive material, promote Prime, retire Codex, delete evidence, claim Phoenix Reborn, or cut over.
Do not treat this SHADOW Quest Board as canonical or execution authority.

campaigns.title: Atlas Codex to Prime Migration
campaigns.current_gate: C07 remains deferred to Gate 8 after Gate 7 capability and recovery proof.
blockers: Gate 7 must close before Gate 8 protected migration work.

campaigns.title: Google Drive Dependency Retirement
campaigns.current_gate: GitHub controls clean source. Drive remains protected reference, archive, collaboration, application, and exception space. No Drive mutation is authorized.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Continue only separately routed read-only dependency reconciliation.

campaigns.title: Atlas Change Path Convergence
campaigns.current_gate: Gates 1-6 complete after the linked doctrine/Quest Reforge. Gate 7 dual-path proof is next.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Prepare only the Gate 7 dual-path proof Preview.

campaigns.title: Quest Board and Emberline Architecture
campaigns.current_gate: Prime Quest Board remains SHADOW and synchronized to canonical Codex continuity without becoming an independent Workboard.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Keep authority SHADOW until cutover and rollback are separately proven and approved.

completion_range.basis: Gates 1-6 and change-path doctrine alignment are complete after this transaction; Gate 7, Gate 8, migration, recovery, rollback, and cutover remain.

quests.next_safe_action: Prepare the Gate 7 dual-path proof Preview.
quests.next_approval_gate: Explicit Jayson approval of the exact Gate 7 Preview.
